      ,[SalesRep1_EmployeeID]
      ,[PaperworkStatusID]
      ,[HoldReasonID]
      ,[ContractID]

      ,[SalesRepSplit]
      ,[LastModifiedOn]
      ,[MeasuredBy]
      ,[ContractDate]
      ,[CancelDate]

      ,[StatusDate]
      ,[GrossAmount]

      ,[JobNetAmt]
      ,[ActualCost]
      ,[FundedDate]
      ,[FundedAmount]
      ,[ParAmount]
      ,[FinanceAmount]
      ,[FinanceMonths]
      ,[FinanceApproved]
      ,[FinanceRate]
      ,[FinanceExpire]
      ,[FinanceFee]
      ,[TotalUnits]
      ,[Purchaser]
      ,[ARIssue]
      ,[FinanceHomeValue]
      ,[LP_JobID]
      ,[LP_LeadID]
      ,[LP_CustomerID]
      ,[LP_IssuedLeadID]
      ,[LP_ProductID]
      ,[LP_JobStatusID]
      ,[LP_ProductionBranchID]
      ,[LP_FinanceSourceID]
      ,[LP_FinanceCompanyID]
      ,[LP_VendorID]
      ,[LP_InstallerID_1]
      ,[LP_InstallerID_2]
      ,[LP_InstallerID_3]
      ,[LP_InstallerID_4]
      ,[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID]
      ,[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID]
      ,[LP_PaperworkStatusID]
      ,[LP_HoldReasonID]
      ,[Division]
      ,[LastUpdateTS]
      ,[FieldSupervisorName]
      ,[EngineerID]
      ,'9999-12-31' as RevenueDate
  FROM [EDW].[FACT_JOB]

source.sqlReaderQuery: select getdate() as insertedated,* from EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL

source.sqlReaderQuery: select getdate() as insertedated,* from EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL

dependsOn.activity: Copy Milestone Jobs data to Parquet file

scripts.text:
declare @insertedDated varchar(10)
set @insertedDated= format(getdate(),'yyyy-MM-dd')


delete from Archive.FACT_JOB_Archive

where cast(insertedDated as date)=@insertedDated

declare @insertedDated varchar(10)
set @insertedDated= format(getdate(),'yyyy-MM-dd')


delete from Archive.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL_Archive

where cast(insertedated as date)=@insertedDated

dependsOn.activity: Copy Fact Data to physical table
Copy Fact MileStone Data to physical table

scripts.text:
UPDATE J
SET J.REVENUEDATE=M.ACTUALDATE
FROM ARCHIVE.FACT_JOB_ARCHIVE J
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT JOBID,INSERTEDATED,MILESTONEDATETYPEID,CAST(ACTUALDATE AS DATE) AS ACTUALDATE FROM ARCHIVE.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL_ARCHIVE) M
ON J.JOBID=M.JOBID 
AND YEAR(CAST(J.INSERTEDDATED AS DATE))=YEAR(CAST(M.INSERTEDATED AS DATE)) 
AND MONTH(CAST(J.INSERTEDDATED AS DATE))=MONTH(CAST(M.INSERTEDATED AS DATE))
AND M.MILESTONEDATETYPEID IN ('SWR-C','CTA-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C')
WHERE YEAR(CAST(J.INSERTEDDATED AS DATE)) = YEAR(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
AND MONTH(CAST(J.INSERTEDDATED AS DATE)) = MONTH(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
AND M.ACTUALDATE IS NOT NULL;
